message:
chore(web): Update help pages and admin featured page

Minor updates to help documentation and admin featured content page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,14 +31,15 @@ USAGE: COMMANDS: list List all prompts - get Get a specific prompt by ID + show Show a specific prompt by ID search Search prompts categories List all categories export Export prompts to files + i Interactive browser FLAGS: --json Output as JSON - --markdown Output as Markdown + --raw Output raw prompt content --help, -h Show help --version, -v Show version`} @@ -54,23 +55,22 @@ jfp list --json`}

Getting a specific prompt

- Use the get command with a prompt ID: + Use the show command with a prompt ID: 

{`# Get a prompt by ID
-jfp get idea-wizard
+jfp show idea-wizard
 
 # Output as JSON
-jfp get idea-wizard --json
+jfp show idea-wizard --json
 
 # Copy directly to clipboard (macOS)
-jfp get idea-wizard | pbcopy`}
+jfp show idea-wizard --raw | pbcopy`}

Viewing categories

{`# List all categories
 jfp categories
 
-# Categories with prompt counts
-jfp categories --counts`}
+# Categories include prompt counts by default`}

Output formats

@@ -79,27 +79,27 @@ jfp categories --counts`}

  • Default — Human-readable with colors
  • --json — Machine-readable JSON
    • -
  • --markdown — Markdown format
  • --raw — Just the prompt content, no formatting
    • +
  • export --format md — Markdown export
{`# JSON for scripting
-jfp get code-reviewer --json
+jfp show code-reviewer --json
 
 # Raw prompt for piping
-jfp get code-reviewer --raw | pbcopy
+jfp show code-reviewer --raw | pbcopy
 
 # Markdown for documentation
-jfp get code-reviewer --markdown > prompt.md`}
+jfp export code-reviewer --format md --stdout > prompt.md`}

Using with AI coding agents

jfp is optimized for use with AI coding agents like Claude Code: 

{`# Get a prompt and pipe to an agent
-jfp get code-reviewer --raw | claude
+jfp show code-reviewer --raw | claude
 
 # Use JSON output for structured parsing
-jfp search "debugging" --json --limit 5`}
+jfp search "debugging" --json --limit 5 | jq -r '.results[0].id'`}

Common options

@@ -114,25 +114,21 @@ jfp search "debugging" --json --limit 5`} - - - - - + - + - - + +
--json Output as JSON
--markdownOutput as Markdown
--raw Just the content, no metadata
--category <cat>Filter by categoryFilter list by category
--limit <n>Limit resultsLimit results (search/suggest)
--no-colorDisable colored outputJFP_NO_COLOR=1Disable colored output (env var)
@@ -143,8 +139,8 @@ jfp search "debugging" --json --limit 5`}

  • 0 — Success
    • -
  • 1 — General error
    • -
  • 2 — Prompt not found
    • +
  • 1 — Error (most failures)
    • +
  • 130 — User cancelled an interactive prompt

Next steps

@@ -38,44 +38,39 @@ jfp search "idee wizrd" # Partial matches work jfp search "refact"`} -

Interactive search (fzf-style)

+

Interactive browser (fzf-style)

For an interactive experience similar to fzf:

- 
{`# Launch interactive search
-jfp search --interactive
-
-# Or use the alias
+        
{`# Launch interactive browser
 jfp i`}

         

           In interactive mode:
         

         
    
           
  • Type to filter results in real-time
    • 
           
  • Use arrow keys to navigate
    • 
-          
  • Press Enter to select and copy
    • 
+          
  • Press Enter to view a prompt
    • 
+          
  • Choose actions like copy, install, or export
    • 
           
  • Press Esc to cancel
    • 
         

 
-        
Filtering results

-        
{`# Filter by category
-jfp search "review" --category debugging
-
-# Filter by tag
-jfp search "code" --tag refactoring
-
-# Filter by difficulty
-jfp search "automation" --difficulty beginner`}

+        
Search scopes (premium)

+        
{`# Search your personal prompts
+jfp search "review" --mine
 
-        
Sorting results

-        
{`# Sort by relevance (default)
-jfp search "testing"
+# Search saved prompts
+jfp search "review" --saved
 
-# Sort alphabetically
-jfp search "testing" --sort alpha
+# Search everything (public + personal)
+jfp search "review" --all
 
-# Sort by date (newest first)
-jfp search "testing" --sort date`}

+# Force local registry only
+jfp search "review" --local`}

+        

+          For exact category or tag filtering, use jfp list --category or{" "}
+          jfp list --tag.
+        

 
         
Limiting output

         
{`# Show only top 5 results
@@ -92,61 +87,55 @@ jfp search "debugging" --limit 1`}

 jfp search "automation" --json
 
 # Pipe to jq for filtering
-jfp search "robot" --json | jq '.[0].id'
+jfp search "robot" --json | jq '.results[0].id'
 
 # Get just the IDs
-jfp search "robot" --json | jq -r '.[].id'`}
+jfp search "robot" --json | jq -r '.results[].id'`} -

Search operators

+

Search tips

- Advanced search syntax: + Queries are keyword-based. Use multiple words to narrow results:

- 
{`# Exact phrase
-jfp search '"code review"'
-
-# OR search
-jfp search "debugging OR testing"
+        
{`# Multi-word query
+jfp search "code review"
 
-# Exclude terms
-jfp search "automation -robot"`}

+# Short query still works
+jfp search automation`}

Combining with other commands

- 
{`# Search then get the first result
-jfp get $(jfp search "wizard" --json | jq -r '.[0].id')
+        
{`# Search then show the first result
+jfp show "$(jfp search "wizard" --json | jq -r '.results[0].id')"
 
 # Search and copy first result to clipboard
-jfp search "review" --limit 1 --raw | pbcopy
+jfp show "$(jfp search "review" --json | jq -r '.results[0].id')" --raw | pbcopy
 
 # Export all search results
-jfp search "debugging" --json | jfp export --stdin --format skill`}

+jfp search "debugging" --json | jq -r '.results[].id' | xargs jfp export --format skill`}
-

Search performance

+

Registry cache

- jfp caches the prompt index locally for fast searches: + jfp uses a local prompt registry cache for fast searches: 

{`# Force refresh the cache
-jfp cache refresh
+jfp refresh
 
 # View cache status
-jfp cache status
-
-# Clear the cache
-jfp cache clear`}
+jfp status`}

Examples

Find prompts for a specific task

{`# Find code review prompts
-jfp search "code review" --category automation
+jfp search "code review"
 
-# Find debugging prompts for beginners
-jfp search "debug" --difficulty beginner`}
+# Browse debugging prompts by category +jfp list --category debugging`}

Build a prompt toolkit

{`# Find all prompts for a project type
 jfp search "testing" --json > my-testing-prompts.json
 
 # Export as Skills for Claude Code
-jfp search "robot mode" | jfp export --format skill --outdir ~/.claude/skills/`}
+jfp search "robot mode" --json | jq -r '.results[].id' | xargs jfp export --format skill`}

Related

@@ -129,10 +129,10 @@ description: Reviews code for bugs, style, and best practices jfp export --format skill "code-reviewer" # Export as Markdown -jfp export --format markdown "code-reviewer" +jfp export --format md "code-reviewer" # Export as JSON -jfp get "code-reviewer" --json > prompt.json`} +jfp show "code-reviewer" --json > prompt.json`} );
